modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks Spanish as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have excessive unnecessary detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be no spelling errors and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to access Self-Service Registration portal for class registration

full_description_text:  
I tried logging into the Self-Service Registration portal to sign up for my classes. But guess what? I hit a wall! The system keeps throwing an error about external authentication. It says something about an identity assertion being null and a UDC Id not being available. Super frustrating! I just want to register for my classes without these hiccups.
short_description: Unable to access Self-Service Registration portal for class registration
